title: JCodesMore/ai-website-cloner-template
friendlyTitle: A template for AI agents that clone website layouts
summary: ai-website-cloner-template is a Next.js template that gives AI coding agents a structured workflow for recreating existing websites from target URLs. It includes agent instructions, component-spec generation, asset extraction, and support for tools such as Claude Code, Codex CLI, OpenCode, GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Windsurf, Gemini CLI, and others.
friendlySummary: This repo helps AI coding agents inspect a website and rebuild a similar Next.js project with structured steps.
whyItMatters: Builders can use it as a starting point for rapid prototyping, design teardown, or internal UI reconstruction workflows where an agent needs a repeatable process. It is also a practical example of packaging agent skills and project scaffolding together.
friendlyWhyItMatters: Use it to study site structure, prototype layouts, or learn how to give coding agents a clear repeatable workflow. Respect copyrights and site terms, obviously.
